name: Dock Magnify
description: macOS-style dock with Gaussian magnification on hover — items scale up based on cursor proximity.
accessibility_notes: labels are hidden by default — add aria-label to icons
magnification is visual-only, does not affect tab order

items.description: Array of { icon: ReactNode, label?: string }

maxSize.description: Maximum magnified icon size in pixels

radius.description: Number of neighboring items affected by magnification

className.description: CSS class for the dock container

conflicts: hover-dependent — no magnification on touch devices
Gaussian calculation runs on every mouse move within the dock
